where.if: AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM weapons weapon_filter WHERE weapon_filter.id = builds.weapon_id ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM build_generations build_generation_filter WHERE build_generation_filter.build_id = builds.id AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM weapon_generations weapon_generation_filter WHERE weapon_generation_filter.weapon_id = builds.weapon_id AND weapon_generation_filter.generation = build_generation_filter.generation ) )

mapper.select:
SELECT id, weapon_id AS weaponId, name, notes, sort_order AS sortOrder, is_favorite AS isFavorite, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM builds
ORDER BY sort_order ASC, updated_at DESC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT id, weapon_id AS weaponId, name, notes, sort_order AS sortOrder, is_favorite AS isFavorite, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM builds WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT item.id, item.build_id AS buildId, item.slot, item.attachment_id AS attachmentId, item.created_at AS createdAt FROM build_items item INNER JOIN builds build ON build.id = item.build_id INNER JOIN weapon_slots weapon_slot ON weapon_slot.weapon_id = build.weapon_id AND weapon_slot.slot = item.slot WHERE item.attachment_id = #{attachmentId} ORDER BY item.build_id ASC, weapon_slot.sort_order ASC, item.slot ASC

SELECT item.id, item.build_id AS buildId, item.slot, item.attachment_id AS attachmentId, item.created_at AS createdAt FROM build_items item INNER JOIN builds build ON build.id = item.build_id INNER JOIN weapon_slots weapon_slot ON weapon_slot.weapon_id = build.weapon_id AND weapon_slot.slot = item.slot WHERE item.build_id = #{buildId} ORDER BY weapon_slot.sort_order ASC, item.slot ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM builds WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO builds ( id, weapon_id, name, notes, sort_order, is_favorite, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{weaponId}, #{name}, #{notes}, #{sortOrder}, #{isFavorite}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE weapon_id = VALUES(weapon_id), name = VALUES(name), notes = VALUES(notes), sort_order = VALUES(sort_order), is_favorite = VALUES(is_favorite), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)

INSERT INTO build_items (id, build_id, slot, attachment_id, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.buildId}, #{item.slot}, #{item.attachmentId}, #{item.createdAt})
